Appearances:
Plaintiffs Sun Chan and Connie Chan are present.

Defendants Shane Geldbach and Michael Mutchinson are present.
Attorney John Nagy appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Sep-14-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
